Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 1, 034 [Sakikku 11][via cams/gkab]

flake
flake 1flake 1

[... rit]-⸢ta⸣-šu₂ ša₂ 15 ⸢GU₇-šu₂⸣ [...]

[...] his right hand hurts him [...].

flake 22

* ⸢rit⸣-ta-šu₂ ša₂ 2.30 GU₇-šu₂ [...]

(If) his left hand hurts him [...].

flake 33

* rit-ta-a-šu₂ GU₇-MEŠ-šu₂ [...]

(If) his hands hurt him [...].

flake 44

* IGI KIŠIB-MEŠ-šu₂ ana U₄ 5-KAM im-ta-[...]

(If) the palm of his hands for 5 days ... [...].

flake 55

* ⸢ŠU⸣-su ša₂ 15 GU₇-šu₂ ŠU dUTU : [...]

(If) his right hand hurts him: hand of Šamaš : [...].

flake 66

* ⸢ŠU⸣-su ša₂ 15 ana KA-šu₂ tur-ra la₃ ZUe ša₂ 2.30 ana ⸢tur-ra⸣ x [...]

(If) he cannot bring his right hand to his mouth, (his) left (hand) [...] bring ... [...].

flake 77

* ŠU-su ša₂ 2.30 ana KA-šu₂ tur-ra la₃ ZUe ša₂ 15 ana tur-ra ina DA AD₂ DI [...]

(If) he cannot bring his left hand to his mouth, (his) right (hand) [...] bring on ... [...].

flake 88

* ⸢ŠU⸣-su ina LI.DUR-šu₂ GAR-ma ŠU-MIN-šu₂ u GIR₃-MIN-šu₂ SED ina la₃ ZU DU₁₁.⸢DU₁₁⸣ub ZIbe₂ [...]

(If) his hand is placed on his navel and his hands and his feet are cold, he continually speaks without knowing it, he stands up [...].

flake 99

* ŠU-MIN-šu₂ SA₅-MEŠ u UZU-MEŠ-šu₂ ⸢SIG₇⸣-[MEŠ ...]

(If) his hands are red and his flesh is pale [...].

flake 1010

* ŠU-MIN-šu₂ SIG₇-MEŠ u UZU-MEŠ-šu₂ ⸢SIG₇⸣-[MEŠ ...]

(If) his hands are pale and his flesh is pale [...].

flake 1111

* ŠU-MIN-šu₂ SIG₇-MEŠ IGI-MIN-šu₂ pu-ṣa ⸢ŠUB⸣ [...]

(If) his hands are pale, his eyes contain white spot(s) [...].

flake 1212

* ŠU-MIN-šu₂ GE₆-MEŠ SIG₃eṣ SAG [...]

(If) his hands are dark: attack of [...]-demon.

flake 1313

* ŠU-MIN-šu₂ GE₆-MEŠ-ma AD₆-šu₂ ma-ši SIG₃⸢eṣ⸣ [...]

(If) his hands are dark and he is unaware of himself: attack of [...]-demon.

flake 1414

* ŠU-MIN-šu₂ GE₆-MEŠ-ma AD₆-šu₂ KUM₂im [...]

(If) his hands are dark and his body is hot [...].

flake 1515

* ŠU-MIN-šu₂ GE₆-MEŠ-ma u UZU-MEŠ-šu₂ SIG₇-⸢MEŠ⸣ [...]

(If) his hands are dark and his flesh is pale [...].

flake 1616

* ŠU-MIN-šu₂ ⸢i⸣-ra-ʾu-u₂-ba ŠU DINGIR TI [...]

(If) his hands tremble: hand of a god ... [...].

flake 1717

* ŠU-MIN-šu₂ it-te-nen-ṣi-la-šu₂ u₃ it-ta-nak-na-an-na ŠU d[...]

(If) his hands are continually cramped and curled up: hand of [...].

flake 1818

* ŠU-MIN-šu₂ ana SU-šu₂ la₃ TEa ŠU dUTU MU KU₃.BABBAR [...]

(If) his hands cannot approach his body: hand of Šamaš concerning silver [...].

flake 1919

* ŠU-MIN-šu₂ am-ša₂-ma ta-ra-ṣa la₃ ZUe u UMUŠ-šu₂ la₃ DAB ⸢ŠU⸣ [...]

(If) his hands are paralysed and he cannot stretch (them) and cannot take any decision: hand of [...].

flake 2020

* ŠU-MIN-šu₂ ina IGI-MEŠ-šu₂ la₃ DU₈-MEŠ MAŠKIM ID₂ [...]

(If) his hands cannot be released from his face: the lurker-demon of the river [...].

flake 2121

* ŠU-MIN-šu₂ ina UGU-šu₂ la₃ DU₈-MEŠ MAŠKIM PA ŠU? [...]

(If) his hands cannot be released from his skull: the lurker-demon ... [...].

flake 2222

* ŠU-MIN-šu₂ ina SAG.DU-šu₂ la₃ DU₈-MEŠ-ni ŠU dDIM₃.ME u₂-x-[...]

(If) his hands cannot be released from his head: hand of Lamaštu ... [...].

flake 2323

* ŠU-MIN-šu₂ ina SAG.DU-šu₂ GARna-ma la ur-⸢ra⸣-da-ni ŠU dLUGAL.IR₉.RA u dMES.⸢LAM⸣.[TA.E₃.A ...]

(If) his hands are placed on his head and do not descend: hand of Lugalira and Meslamtaea [...].

flake 2424

[...] ⸢ŠU⸣-MIN-šu₂ ina SAG.DU-šu₂ GARna-ma la ur-⸢ra-da⸣-ni ŠA₃-MEŠ na-šu₂-u KUM₂ ṣa-ri-⸢iḫ⸣ [...]

[...] his hands rest on his head and do not descend, his intestines are puffed up (and) he is hot with fever [...].

flake 2525

[... ŠU-MIN]-šu₂ ina KA-šu₂ GARna-ma ta-tab-ba-lam-ma ana KA-šu₂ u₂-tar [...]

[...] his [hands] rest on his mouth and you take (them) away but he turns (them) back to his mouth [...].

flake 2626

[... ŠU-MIN]-⸢šu₂⸣ ina KA-šu₂ u₂-man-zaq BIR₇uḫ₂ ŠA₃-MEŠ-šu₂ IL₂u₂ u u₂-x-[...]1

[...] he sucks his [hands] in his mouth, he is swollen, his intestines are puffed up and ... [...].

flake 2727

[... ŠU-MIN]-⸢šu₂⸣ ina KA-šu₂ u₂-ṭab-be TUG₂-su it-ta-na-suk u UMUŠ-šu₂ la₃ [...]

[...] he sticks his [hands] in his mouth, throw off his garment and cannot [...] any decision [...].

flake 2828

[... ŠU-MIN]-⸢šu₂⸣ AD₆-šu₂ TAG-MEŠ BU [...]

[...] his [hands] grasp his body, ... [...].

flake 2929

[...] AD₆-šu₂ ma-gal TAG-MEŠ ⸢GIM⸣ TAG-ME la₃ ZU [...]

[...] strongly grasp his body so that he does not know they grasp [...].

flake 3030

[...] SAG.DU-su ma-gal TAG-MEŠ [...]

[...] strongly grasp his head [...].

flake 3131

[...] ⸢ka⸣-ma-ma GIR₃-MIN-šu₂ šad-da : [...]

[...] are bound and his feet are taut : [...].

flake 3232

[...] ⸢it⸣-ta-⸢na-aš⸣-gag-ga [...]

[...] are continually stiffened [...].

flake 3333

[...] KI.MIN u GIR₃-[MIN]-šu₂ nu-up-pu-⸢ḫa⸣ [...]

[...] ditto and his feet are swollen [...].

flake 3434

[...] x-ta-ṣa-⸢la⸣ [...] ⸢TA KA⸣ [...]

[...] ... [...] ... [...]

flake 3535

[...] x x (x) [...]

[...] ... [...]

(end surface missing)

1"KUM₂ UH₂" seems very similar to line 24 "KUM₂ ṣa-ri-ih", but UH₂ is not attested for ṣarahu. Instead, we can read BIR₇{+uh₂} for napāhu (Labat 1951/1, p. 25).
